segments.text: Kuro keeps the edgeguard going with KO opportunities!
segments.original_text: 復帰阻止展開が継続してくろー選手の撃墜チャンスがありました

segments.text: But he barely makes it back
segments.original_text: なんとか生還できたが
パーセント差100%あるんですが
んーこれ強いんだよな

full_text: Kuro keeps the edgeguard going with KO opportunities! But he barely makes it back There's a 100% damage gap though Yeah, that's insane
